articles.summary: The regular season of Milan U15 ended on a high note: the Rossoneri finished the group in first place and now set their sights on the Playoffs which will start on May 5th at Udinese, for the round of 16.

articles.title: Viviano: "Milan and Juve in April almost without goals: quite sad"

articles.title: They took it away from him through a trial, but now Mancini wins the Qatar title with Al Sadd
articles.summary: (ANSA) - ROME, APRIL 27 - Roberto Mancini wins the title of Qatar champion with Al Sadd thanks to the 3-2 victory over Al Shamal, second in the table and now at -5.
